title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
summary: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
briefing: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.

title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
summary: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
briefing: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

summary: Crypto Biz: How stablecoins found their niche

briefing: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.
